text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Nikkei Shinshun Hai is today. Meisho Doto
timidly steps up to her first self-initiated
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to become capable of supporting
T.M. Opera O, she presses forward with the
well-wishes of her best friend,
Matikanefukukitaru.
